TextENGNew: Today's self-study period should have been enjoyable, but somehow the excitement was lacking.
This was because Rena had been acting strangely since morning.
``You haven't looked well all day. ...Are you feeling sick?``
``...No, I'm not sick. ...Hau...``
``There's that sigh again. Did you know every time you sigh, a little more happiness slips away?``
``...Yeah. ...Happiness... ...Hau...``
She hadn't been this bad when we arrived at school... Was she coming down with something after all?
She'd been dazed all morning, as though running a slight fever.
``Do you want some cold medicine from the nurse's office? The temperature difference between day and night has been quite severe lately.``
``...No, I'm fine. ...Could everyone just... leave Rena alone today. ...Could you?``
Rena said only that, her voice faint and listless, before slipping away from our circle and returning to her own seat. There she rested her chin on her hand, stared out the window, and sighed again.
``Hm-hmmmm? From what this ol' man can see, that there is love!``
``L-l-love?! A-awawawa, th-that's, well, oh ho ho, what a splendid development indeed!``
``Ohhh~? Rena-san seems to be doing rather well for herself... *whistle*``
``...More to the point, Shion — what are you doing here? Even during self-study, you can't just wander in without permission.``

``Oh, come now, never mind the details. But there's no doubt about it! Her heart and mind are clearly elsewhere, lost in thoughts of a certain someone. She's sitting there with her chin in her hand, sighing — the very picture of a maiden in love!``
``I-is that right...? To me it looks more like... well, she swallowed something odd yesterday, and it's made her feel off...``
``Something odd — what do you mean?``
``Hm? Oh. So yesterday, when we went to the treasure hunt. ...Something fell out of nowhere — I'm not sure what. Anyway, it popped right into her mouth and she accidentally swallowed it whole.``
``Fell from the sky? Ahahahaha! That must have been one of Cupid's arrows of love.``
``...Fell... from the sky?``

While the rest of us were absorbed in talking about Rena, Rika-chan — who had been quietly planting a toy frog under Satoko's chair — suddenly pricked up something like cat ears and turned around. ...They're ordinary human ears viewed from the side, aren't they? I must be seeing things.
``...Keiichi. What happened to Rena?``
``Well, it's like this. Yesterday, she heard a new heap had appeared at the dam site, and off we went treasure hunting.``
``And then the usual nonsense happened, and while she was laughing with her mouth wide open staring up at the sky, something fell right into her mouth and she accidentally swallowed it.``
``...Something fell from the sky into her mouth? And she swallowed it?``
``...Did you hear that, Rika?``
``And hey — what exactly are you about to do to my seat?!``
``Nipah~, I'll deal with that later. ...Huh? M-mii! This is terrible!!``
Hearing that panicked cry, I turned around.
As Rena breathed out another sigh, her expression dreamy and vacant, I could see Rika-chan creeping toward her with cautious steps.
In her hand, for some reason, was a garishly decorated compass. And then, after watching Rena for a while... an expression I rarely saw on her spread across her face — eyes wide with shock.
changeReason: Old translates 方位磁石 as 'directional magnet'; new correctly translates it as 'compass.'

TextENGNew: She then darted over to Satoko and the two of them retreated to the corner of the classroom. ...What was going on?
``M-m-m-m... meeeeep?!``
``Wha?! Wh-wh-what on earth are you crying out for?! You don't mean — ?!``
``I-I can sense the magatama's presence inside Rena! The magatama's power has taken root in her!``
``Oh, well then, that makes things simpler. Shall we try an ambush gut-punch?  ...Her counterattack would kill me. Then what about a laxative? ...Rika, you do it!!``
``It's not that simple, mii!``

``According to the ancient texts I read yesterday, if a magatama is swallowed it dissolves into the body. Because Rena ate it, the magatama lost its material form and transferred its power into her!``
``So what you're saying is... the magatama is some kind of consumable, and if you swallow it your body absorbs it?``
``Wh-wh-what should we do?!@k@vS07/04/330400087. Your ancestors were the ones who sealed this away for so long, Rika -- can't you do something about it?!``
changeReason: Old says Rika's ancestors 'created' the item; new (and the Japanese 封印) correctly says they 'sealed' it away.

TextENGNew: ``Mii, of course I can do something. If we gather both magatama — red and white — and perform the counter-charm in Oyashiro-sama's sacred grounds, the Furude Shrine, the curse can be lifted.``
``Then it's simple! We march Rena to the shrine on the way home and it's done!``
``But Rena only swallowed the red magatama. Without the white one, the curse can't be broken. As things stand, Rena will fall helplessly in love with whoever picks up the white magatama.``
``And the fact that the red magatama's effects are already appearing in Rena means someone has already found it. That person is surely the one filling Rena's thoughts right now.``
``Mii — if Rena runs wild and reaches a happy ending, her entire life will be ruined... mii!``
``R-r-Rikaaaaaaa!!! Your ancestors sealed this magical item away, so you are the one who must take responsibility!``
``Why on earth does such a dangerous item serve as a sacred treasure of the Furude Shrine?!``
``Used correctly, its love-binding effect is quite wonderful. That much is beyond question, mii!``
``It caused a massive disaster long ago, didn't it?!``
``Ahh, now I finally understand — I understand perfectly well why your ancestors sealed it! What a thoroughly inconvenient god Oyashiro-sama is!!``
``...Mii. Having said that, if the people of the village in ancient times had donated a little more generously to the shrine, things might have been different.``
``If there had been adequate donations, they might have had the materials and craftsmen to build a more robust incense burner and seal it properly!``
``Relying on taxes from the very start is just the excuse of a politician with nothing to offer!``
``If adequate social welfare requires higher taxes, you can't just demand people pay more! I'd rather you stop spending hundreds of millions on roads that carry only a handful of cars a day!!``

``And then, to avoid cutting next year's allocation, you have to rush pointless construction work at year's end just to balance the books!! Doesn't the road outside the toy shop in Okinomiya get repaved every single year?!``

``And yet medical costs for ordinary citizens keep rising — no matter how you look at it, it makes absolutely no sense!!  I know, there's no point saying any of this to you, Rika, but honestly, it's just infuriating!``
``Mii — we have no voting rights, so nothing we say here will change anything! If I have grievances, I'll make sure to go vote when I turn twenty! That is the rule of democracy!``
``This is hardly the place for a political campaign! Rika, you need to take responsibility for the actions of your ancestors and face the consequences!``
``Perhaps you should experience Shion-san's handmade tickle torture machine — full course — just as I was forced to endure it!``
``M-m-m-meeeeeep!! S-s-Satoko, you're a demon! A demon, a devil, a monster!! That is not a device fit for human hands?!``
``Oh ho ho ho, ohhh ho ho ho!! You have my sympathies, but prepare yourself!! You shall suffer every bit as much as I did when Shion-san sat there laughing heartily beside me through mine!!``
``...Wait, eeep?``
Suddenly, both Satoko and Rika were scooped up by the backs of their necks. ...Were they kittens? Mrrrow.
It was Shion and I who had picked them up.
``...I'm not sure what you two were flailing about for, but you clearly know something. Don't you? About what's happened to Rena!``
``...We can deal with Satoko later. But to understand Rika-speak you need a Mii-lingual translator. Which is it — yes or no?``
``That kind of playing dumb is definitely suspicious. What did you two do to Rena?!``
``...There's no point in playing dumb any longer, I suppose.``
In any case, they couldn't leave Rena like this. The two of them came clean and asked for everyone's help...
``The sacred treasure of the Furude Shrine, the Magatama of Fuwarazu?!``
``...That's right. A wonderfully(ly troublesome) love-binding treasure, whose name is said to mean 'free of discord.'``
``Going by the illustrations in the scroll... they just look like fur seal keyrings to me?``
``I agree. Even without falling into her mouth, knowing Rena, she'd have taken them home anyway. Still, they do have rather charming shapes~.``
``I saw something on television once about how fur seals breed with tremendous vigour, so they're sometimes used as symbols of passionate love.``
``Oh really...! Then that would be proof that the fur seal existed in Japan hundreds, perhaps thousands of years ago — and had even made its way to the Furude Shrine?!``
``Indeed. These may well be genuine out-of-place artefacts.``
``But there's one thing I don't understand! Why would something like that fall from the sky and land in Rena's mouth?``
``Still, I find it a little surprising that Oyashiro-sama's treasures would be about binding people in love. I always imagined him more as someone who cursed and plagued people.``

``True — in recent years, with all the talk of Oyashiro-sama's curse, he's gotten a rather fearsome reputation. But originally, Oyashiro-sama was also a god of bonds and marriage. ...The core doctrine being: get along, or be cursed.``
``Indeed. I remember the Furude Shrine used to sell love charms. I rather wish I'd bought one... *tch*.``
``So... the love-binding effect of these magatama isn't just a comforting tale — they're genuinely miraculous?!``
``...That is right. And at this moment, Rena is in the grip of the Magatama of Fuwarazu's power.``
``Let me get this straight — it's a red-and-white pair, right? The person who holds the red one falls in love with the person who holds the white one? So it's not mutual — it's all one way?``
``...Yes. Rena swallowed the red one, so whoever picks up the white one, she'll inevitably go after them. Meep.``
``Th-this has turned into quite a peculiar situation!``
``...And to restore Rena-san to normal, we need to find the white magatama, is that it?``
``And judging by how Rena's acting, someone has already found the white one?! If we leave this alone, she'll just fall deeper and deeper for whoever that is. Regardless of how she actually feels.``
``It's romantic in a way, I suppose, but having no idea what sort of person found it is rather alarming. Anyone who so much as picks it up wins her heart, right?``
``...Yes. Child or elder, man or woman — it makes no distinction. And if it happened to be someone's spouse who found it, the resulting tragedy would be... nipah~☆``
changeReason: Old says 'a family member picking it up' while new says 'someone's spouse who found it'; the Japanese 家族持ち means 'someone who already has a family/is married,' making the new translation more accurate.

TextENGNew: ``This is amus— ...Ah. *cough* *cough* This sounds very serious! It seems like we need to act immediately?!``
``We do. And since it still takes effect if swallowed, if a passing dog happened to eat it... ...that would be an entirely different sort of catastrophe.``
``A d-d-d-dog?! These things even work on animals?!``
``D-dogs are cute and all, but this ol' man will have to take a pass on being coupled with a dog...``
``...In fact, if anyone IS okay with it, I'd certainly like to hear their reasoning.``
``Why? If Rena-san simply became fond of a dog, that would be the least harmful outcome possible, wouldn't it??``
``...I think you'll understand when you fall in love yourself, Satoko. There there☆.``
``Anyway, what we know is that these magatama bewitch the heart. We need to do something before it's too late!``
``Indeed. Free will matters in love. Being forced into it by some magical means is simply not acceptable!``
``...Though it is just the tiniest bit romantic!``
``...In any case, let's act before this becomes irreversible. If we don't, it will be a genuine disaster.``
``The problem is: who found the white seal? Even in a small village like Hinamizawa, if we don't know who it was, we have no way forward.``
``Hmm? But that's the easy part! The magic is making Rena fall in love with whoever has the white magatama, right? That person is all she's thinking about! All we have to do is ask Rena directly!``
``Renaaaa~~!!! This ol' man wants to know! Who's the one who's stolen your heart, hmmmm?``
...I'd seen Rena go into a frenzy many a time by now, but this was, without question, the longest one yet.
``...Ha... hauuuu, I can't say it... Hau~!``
``...W-well, I figured that might happen. But she's gotten a lot stronger... And there are a lot more hits in the combo...``
``...She'll undoubtedly be nerfed in the next patch. Nipah~☆``
``Sis, are you all right? Asking a girl who she likes so directly — you have absolutely no tact, as usual.``
``...I'm sorry — this ol' man doesn't quite understand what it's like to be a girl...``
Aaahhhh, what a mess this was turning into...
``And of all people, this had to happen to Rena-san...? She's the sort whose feelings of love translate directly into offensive power. This situation is only going to get more complicated...``
``And it's because the Furude Shrine let this happen in the first place, Rika — you need to come up with a plan!``
``...Mii, I might think a bit harder if you drop the tickle torture punishment...!``
``Oh, is that so? Then perhaps a short trial session would help motivate you! Shion-san, Shion-san, could I have a word...?``
``I-I'll think about it!!``
``Mii, I've got it!``
``...That sounded rather half-hearted. What have you come up with?``
Rika-chan pointed toward Rena's seat.
...Apparently tired of resting her chin on her hand, Rena had started reading.
She sometimes put aside the horseplay and read. It was nothing unusual.
``...But something does seem different. She's brought several books that aren't quite her usual sort.``
``What's the matter, Satoko?``
``...Take a careful look at Rena-san. She might be giving us a hint.``
``I wonder what she's reading. Hard to tell from this distance...``
Having learned her lesson from Rena's assault earlier, Mion was maintaining considerably more distance than strictly necessary.
``What is it? Those look like how-to books of some kind. What on earth is she studying?``
``Ah! Photographs! It looks like a photography magazine!!``
``And there's a camera catalogue too! In all of Hinamizawa, there's only one person who matches those keywords!!``
``No doubt about it! She even has the special low-angle nurse edition of Weekly Intensive Snap!! There's absolutely only one person this could be!!``
...The last item was rather alarming, but anyway — with all these clues lined up, it could only be him.
That vague, wandering individual becoming Rena's (involuntary) object of one-sided devotion — frankly, it was hard to accept.
``Hau~ I wonder if he'd teach me how to use a camera if I asked. If I asked him...!``

``I wonder if he'd guide me step by step, if he would, if he would! I wonder if he'd be kind to me if I came dressed as a nurse! If I dressed up, dressed up, dressed up! And then, and then, hau hau, hau~~~!!``
Rena calmly rose from her seat!
Hearts and flower petals filled her eyes; whatever vision played behind them must have been extraordinary.
``Hey, hey, Mii-chan! Rena suddenly doesn't feel well, so she's going home early, hau~!!``
What recklessness! Rena burst out of the classroom without waiting for school to end!!
``Ahh, Renaaaa!! Oh — Shion, you're in just the right spot!! Don't let Rena leave — stop her!!``
``I-I can't!! Sis, we all just saw what she did to you a moment ago!!``
``...It does seem like even all the club members combined would stand no chance against her right now.``
``Even so, we can't let this happen!! Satoko!!``
Mion snapped her fingers, and a single cord dropped down from the ceiling into Satoko's waiting hands.
``Aye aye, sir!! Take this!!``
Satoko yanked it hard! — and the jump-rope mechanism snapped into place across the corridor near Rena's feet as she ran for the entrance!
``Trip her up first, then everybody pile on!!``
``Fugyah?!``
But before Satoko could finish speaking, there came the loud snap of the jump rope tearing in two. ...What kind of superhuman strength did it take to tear through a nylon jump rope?
A mere jump rope was unable to stop Rena, and she was already at the shoe cubbies, swapping into her outdoor shoes!
``Hey!! No running in the halls!!``
``I'm sorry, Sensei — Rena is going home early today~~!! I'll make sure to invite you to the reception! Hau~!!``
``Wh-What?! ...Hey, stop! ...Ughhh, I didn't want one of my students to beat me to it...!``
``Wait — that's not what you should be upset about!!``
``W-we're leaving early too! Anyway — let's find Tomitake-san before Rena does and get the white magatama!``
``That's our only choice! Let's search the places Tomitake-san is likely to be!!``
``...Rikaaa! Use that dubious aura-detector of yours to track him down!``

``...Mii, I rather dislike that name for it, but... this direction leads to the Furude Shrine! Tomitake mentioned yesterday that he was coming to take photos, so he's probably in the shrine grounds! And I'm sure Takano is with him!``
``...Oh, wonderful. Truly, bless all conventions and clichés! Couples are always together at moments like this, aren't they?``
``Mion-san, Rika says Tomitake-san should be at the shrine!!``
``Is that so, Rika-chan?! I was just thinking the same thing!!``
``But it seems Rena-san has the same idea!! She's running toward the sh — wow, she's fast?!``
``What speed!! She'll be out of sight in no time...!!``
``We have no choice but to run after her! We have to do something before Rena starts making her move on Tomitake-san!``
``...Then Takano will get jealous, and the awkward love triangle will make everything worse. Nipah~☆``
``Well, I don't particularly mind if that couple falls apart, but...``
``...She might take her frustration out by giving you extra injections during your check-ups at the clinic, you know?``
``Th-this is no joking matter~!!``
Meanwhile, Rena had long since vanished from sight.
But there was no stopping now. Our only option, as Mion had said, was to chase her down as fast as possible and contain the damage!
